headline: Lamar Advertising Stock Gains 20.3% in 3 Months: Will the Trend Last?
summary: LAMR stock has surged 20% in three months, fueled by digital expansion, acquisitions, and strong industry tailwinds, but can these growth drivers sustain momentum?

headline: How The Prologis (PLD) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Targets And Risks
summary: Prologis has seen a modest shift in the analyst narrative, with one fair value estimate moving from US$148.25 to US$150.65. That change lines up with several firms lifting price targets into the US$140s and US$150s, reflecting updated views on industrial REIT fundamentals, occupancy expectations and valuation, even as some analysts remain more cautious. As you read on, you will see how to follow this evolving story and what it might mean for your own view on the stock. Analyst Price Targets...
